summary: Session 5 (Verification owed - every surface says so, Features 4-5 + S1 bundles C/E) complete. Gate (A6): dedicated_verification gains the shared cross_provider_satisfied / work_session_pairs predicate - a verification session passes when it differs from every work session by engine OR by model provider; the engine arm keeps the legacy set-based semantics unchanged (nothing previously passing regresses), the new provider arm is strictly pairwise with missing data failing closed (a verification session without --provider cannot satisfy it; a work session with no recorded identity can never be confirmed different); the no-baseline check widened to engine-or-provider; the failure corrective names both remedies (engine difference, or recording providers on the work sessions) per critique M5, with an explicit hint when the work sessions carry no provider data, and quotes the as_posix set-dir so pasted commands survive spaces/backslashes. Start-time guardrail (M1): _refuse_same_pair_verification in start_session mirrors the close-gate predicate exactly (it can never refuse a passable start; silent when no work identity is recorded - the close gate owns that case) and fires fail-loud BEFORE any write on both the plain --type verification start and the verification handoff, printing the sanctioned Copilot model-picker pattern inline. Bundle C: _capture_path_aware_critique + _capture_contract_gate added to the typed-start path and all three policy captures to the handoff path (idempotent), so a set whose first boundary call is a typed session no longer silently disarms the Set 066/070 close gates. Feature 4: new ai_router/pending_verification.py derives owed-verification notices (the set being started, stalled in-progress Mode-B siblings, and the most recently completed sibling; Mode-A owed keys on the S4 external_verification parser - latest-round WAIVED is a durable opt-out and never nags, ISSUES_FOUND yields the respond-to-round-N notice, absence/template-only/spec-scope-only always owes; MAX_NOTICES cap; side-effect-free readers, never raises, zero router config) and start_session prints it as a loud advisory ASCII banner on work-session starts (stderr, never blocks, never changes exit status). A7: the Explorer now prefers the durable activity-log verificationMode record over the spec seed (durableVerificationModeFrom TS mirror of read_verification_mode, last-valid-record-wins), applied at scan time so every downstream consumer (kickoff/setup action gates, v?/v+ markers, N/M+ fraction, the new workflow-state derivation) reads the same effective mode the Python gates do; deriveWorkflowState is the TS mirror of the seven-state ladder including this session's blank-verdict adjudication, derived only on Lightweight Mode-B rows. Feature 5 UI (with A9): the Start Next Session copy action auto-routes by derived state (awaiting-verification -> pointer-style verification kickoff, awaiting-remediation -> new remediation handoff prompt; awaiting-human deliberately not auto-routed - a human decides; the status-bar message names the reroute); the kickoff prompt was rewritten pointer-style (canonical Mode B procedure referenced, entry-point command inline, required output named) and both typed prompts carry the dabbler-ai-router >= 0.27.0 version-skew line (M6); the row description says 'verification owed' / 'remediation owed' in words (cancelled rows suppressed - the terminal-suppression catch from this session's code-review adjudication); progressText gains the plusFraction '+' so it stops contradicting fractionFor (bundle B). Bundle E robustness: _write_json_atomic extracted and shared by seed_issues_envelope (whose FileExistsError never-overwrite guard would otherwise entomb a partial write forever) and the minimal-activity-log creation; derive_state adjudication - a completed verification round with no findings envelope and no VERIFIED verdict is unconfirmable and now derives awaiting-human pre-terminal, while a terminally-closed set keeps the legacy closed-verified reading (the Q6 gate vouched at close; the banner must not chase finished sets); the deferred round-1 filename-collision nit (sN-issues.json vs sN-issues-round-1.json keying) is recorded in s5-code-review adjudication. Docs: workflow doc Mode B section documents the engine-or-provider gate, the sanctioned single-engine Copilot model-picker pattern, the start-time refusal, the legacy null-provider posture, and the two new owed-state surfaces, with every different-engine echo updated (L-065-1); the consumer AGENTS.md tail template gains the Copilot-locked pattern bullet (cold-start goldens regenerated, dist recompiled, drift guard green). Routed code-review (sonnet + gemini-pro auto-verify, raw in s5-code-review.md): two fixes applied (cancelled-row owed-word suppression; remediation-prompt resume-vs-open prose), four findings rejected with evidence (incl. the auto-verifier-refuted TS/Python remediation-divergence claim), two deferred with reason (round-1 filename keying - mirror fidelity, the sanctioned writer never emits -round-1; banner I/O - one small JSON read per sibling once per session boundary, same walk precedent as summarize_drift). Verification (gpt-5.4, raw in s5-verification*.md): round 1 token-less with three unspecified-severity findings (treated blocking per L-071-1) - finding 1's behavioral premise (liveSession null on complete sets) is false but the recurring misread earned a clarity refactor (explicit rawSetStatus local) plus the exact terminal-branch fixture the verifier requested (passes against unchanged wiring); finding 2 (close gate accepts any historical independent round) dispositioned advisory-disagreement: by-design under the locked Set 057 at-least-one contract which this set's spec extends additively, front door closed by the new M1 guardrail on both writer paths - ESCALATED to the operator here for a decision on whether a future set should strengthen the terminal-close check to the latest round; finding 3 (banner said <other-engine>, contradicting the sanctioned same-engine pattern) fixed with neutral placeholders + the differ-by clause and a text-locking regression test. Round 2 (narrow) verified findings 1-2 and flagged one Major that was an evidence-bundle gap, not a code gap - the fixed file is untracked so git diff omitted it (L-064-9's class); round 3, fed the file source directly: VERIFIED. Suites at close: pytest 2372/5/0 (full run green), tsc clean, mocha 1095 passing, Playwright 19/19 serial local, routed gate REQUIRED (blast-radius + multi-module + breadth) and satisfied.

reason.specifics: Routed analysis at S5 close (gemini-pro) confirmed the standing S6 recommendation: the session's critical path is the required multi-provider path-aware critique - a holistic large-context analysis task - plus release mechanics and UAT coordination; medium effort has sufficed for all five sessions and there is no reason to deviate. Operator prerequisites for S6: renew VSCE_PAT before the vsix-v0.34.0 tag push, and refresh router-config.yaml metadata.pricing_reviewed (the stale-price warning fired on every routed call this session).
